name: Velocity Drive Module
oracle_text:
When ~ enters, energize.
Whenever you activate an Alt-Mode ability of a creature you control, add {R}.
flavor_text: The perfect shift requires precise timing and an immediate burst of power.
design_notes: This card is designed specifically for the UR 'High-Speed Ignition' archetype. It bridges the two core mechanics: Energon (resource generation) and Alt-Mode (morphology/tempo). By providing an Energon token on entry, it serves its role as a resource-generating artifact. Its secondary ability rewards players for using the Alt-Mode mechanic by providing Red mana, which can be used to fuel further activations or aggressive spells, effectively creating a 'high-speed' loop of shifting forms and combat pressure.
